item.title: Guidecraft Children's Standing Towers Recalled Due to Risk of Serious Injury from Fall Hazard
item.company: Online at Guidecraft, Amazon, Wayfair, Walmart, Target, Maisonette and Overstock from June 2022 through October 2023 for about $200.
item.brand: Online at Guidecraft, Amazon, Wayfair, Walmart, Target, Maisonette and Overstock from June 2022 through October 2023 for about $200.
item.summary: This recall involves Classic and Contemporary Guidecraft Kitchen Helper Towers in nine colors sold from June 1, 2022, through October 31, 2023. Recalled towers have both an item number and lot number shown on the lists provided and were purchased from June 1, 2002, through October 31, 2023. This information can be found on the foil sticker at the bottom of each tower's platform.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Guidecraft Kitchen Helper Towers.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the recalled towers immediately and contact Guidecraft for free repair parts and installation instructions.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
